title: Evangelion related stuff in Tokyo
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion-related stuff in Tokyo             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Aug 10, 2024 3:13 pm Hi! Next week I'll be traveling to Japan for a couple weeks. To those that have been there, what Eva-related store/atraction should I visit. The Eva-store is a must, but what else would you recomend? Thanks! (Ps, I wasn't sure if this thread should go here or in off-topic)

[]: Re: Evangelion-related stuff in Tokyo             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Sun Aug 11, 2024 4:00 am "Small worlds Tokyo" in Ariake. It is a theme park with two 1/80-scale areas dedicated to Evangelion. I guess it would be interesting to go there and make some pictures. Yet, I think you would need tickets. For more info: https://smallworlds.jp/en/

[]: Re: Evangelion-related stuff in Tokyo             Quote Post by Tim Julius » Mon Aug 26, 2024 9:56 am Hi! Besides the Eva Store, what other Evangelion-related stores or attractions in Japan would you recommend visiting?
